data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for the status lifecycle.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for the status lifecycle (draft, active, suspended, terminated, expired). However, the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or records related to the status lifecycle of the BAA or any other relevant entities. The linked use case mentions the need for tracking BAA status, but no actual records or checks are presented in the evidence to confirm this requirement, leading to an inconclusive result.
gaps: No evidence of status lifecycle checks for BAA.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add checks for BAA status lifecycle
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete checks that verify the status lifecycle of BAA.
